_meta.purpose: Design SS5.3: model selection is indirected through abstract tiers; this is the one config table mapping tier -> concrete model id. Config, not code -- update here (and only here) when Anthropic ships/renames models. Re-check after any SS10.3 volatility event.
_meta.efforts_note: I24 (P3v2-6): efforts are validated for run-log records; Agent/Task spawn calls have no effort param (workers inherit session effort). Per-spawn actuation: claude -p --effort (measured-applied), agent-frontmatter effort / Workflow opts.effort (docs-verified, application unprobed) -- probe addendum 2026-07-05.
